### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Security](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Security.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Security')

## IEventPayloadProtectionService Interface

Optional infrastructure hook for protecting event payloads and snapshot state before storage,
and unprotecting them before publication or replay\.

```csharp
public interface IEventPayloadProtectionService
```
### Methods

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Security.IEventPayloadProtectionService.ProtectEventPayloadAsync(Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Identity.AggregateIdentity,Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Events.IEventPayload,string,byte[],string,System.Threading.CancellationToken)'></a>
